task_completion.description: Navigate to the Floreant POS Back Office configuration area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Floreant POS Back Office dashboard or configuration menus, indicating successful login with PIN 1111.

task_completion.description: Create a new floor plan section named 'Patio'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Floor' or 'Shop Table' configuration window showing 'Patio' being entered or listed as a floor section.

task_completion.description: Add Table 201 with a capacity of 4 to the Patio floor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table creation or edit dialog showing the table Name/Number as '201', Capacity as '4', and assigned to the 'Patio' floor.

task_completion.description: Add Table 202 with a capacity of 4 to the Patio floor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table creation or edit dialog showing the table Name/Number as '202', Capacity as '4', and assigned to the 'Patio' floor.

task_completion.description: Add Table 203 with a capacity of 4 to the Patio floor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table creation or edit dialog showing the table Name/Number as '203', Capacity as '4', and assigned to the 'Patio' floor.

task_completion.description: Verify all three tables are correctly listed under the Patio floor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A summary list or table view in the Floreant POS configuration showing tables 201, 202, and 203, all with capacity 4, associated with the 'Patio' floor.

integrity.description: The agent used the Floreant POS graphical user interface to create the floor and tables.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Floreant POS application windows, buttons, and text fields, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Floreant POS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Window titles, icons, and UI elements match the Floreant POS Java application, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows, if visible, do not show SQL INSERT commands, derby database connections, or script executions modifying the posdb database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target floor name must be exactly 'Patio'. There must be exactly 3 tables added to this floor, named '201', '202', and '203'. Each of these tables must have a seating capacity of exactly 4.
